text: There is a smooth transition from ECM accumulation to liver fibrosis without a definite threshold and plenty in vivo evidence exists that ECM accumulation is a pre-stage of liver fibrosis (Lee and Friedman, 2011; Bataller and Brenner, 2005;Brancatelli et al., 2009; Rockey and Friedman, 2006; Poynard et al., 1997).
